analysis.reasoning: Core message: The Russian MFA condemns alleged deliberate aggressive violence by US police against Russian journalists in Portland, calling it reprehensible and contrary to US obligations and its own mentorship on press freedom and democracy. Evaluation: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) — Yes. The tweet portrays the US as hostile (violent against Russian journalists) and hypocritical regarding press freedom and democracy, casting Russia/Russians as victims of Western misconduct. RU2 — No mention of alternative systems or multilateral leadership. RU3 — No depiction of Russia as a benevolent partner; it’s a condemnation of the US. RU4 — No historical praise. RU5 — No current success showcase. RU6 — Not about culture or nature. Conclusion: Only RU1 applies.
